name: _resolve-python.sh 4-rung validated interpreter ladder (venv -> versioned -> uv -> probed python3)

Line 1 is the mcp_dir the argv was resolved for — the installed plugin path embeds the version, so the cache is version-keyed for free. A hit requires the mcp_dir to match AND the leading binary to still resolve ([ -x ] for a path, command -v for a bare name); every other state (corrupt/unreadable/mismatched/stale) is a miss, never an error. Deliberately NO version re-probe on a hit — that fork is exactly the cost the cache removes; the hit path is pure shell builtins, no fork.
